title: The Depths of Impel Down
description: In the Impel Down storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #3, Whitebeard, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #1 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What is this giant stone thing....!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Where are those three!!? Find them !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You've really screwed things up now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Why don't you go tell nagellan ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: that I'll lend him a hand.....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Do you think I'm respon- Bible too...!!?
